S.FORM: == Lalan == Adihay ko lalan no Taywan, kasiroma ko ngangan no lalan,
S.PHON: == ɾaɾan == aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u ɾaɾan no~u tajwan, kasiro~uma ko~u ŋaŋan no~u ɾaɾan,

S.PHON: == ɾaɾan == aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u ɾaɾan no~u tajwan, kasiro~uma ko~u ŋaŋan no~u ɾaɾan,
